support.summary: No CEO action required; early-stage discovery, no blocked lever
support.detail: This $200K Corporativo Fragua S2P evaluation is in early Formal Evaluation with no pricing block, roadmap commitment, presales guarantee, or exec-connect ask on the table. The Economic Buyer is not even identified (X10a_Sponsor__c, Who_will_approve_budget__c null), so there is nothing for the CEO to approve or personally broker. Standard EB discovery and NDA follow-up are fully within the RSD's remit.
support.why_not_vp: No commercial/product/exec lever is in play; ordinary rep+AE motion (identify EB, run discovery, chase NDA) is all that is needed.

monitor.reason: Deal is engaged and moving (last activity 4 days ago, discovery held 6/23, inbound email 7/2); the only open item (NDA return) is buyer-dependent, not our slip; deal is not large/forecasted; no competitor surfaced.
